source: Stripe Projects catalog (stripe projects catalog --json), Mar 2026

primary_choice.error: Free plan resource provision limit exceeded (provider message during add). Stripe status shows resource name Railway/hosting in errored state.

fallback_attempts.error: Timed out waiting for Vercel account linking (browser auth required).
Active plan required to provision sandbox.

compute_hosting.note: Complete hosting via Railway upgrade/cleanup in dashboard, or run stripe projects link vercel and re-run add with browser auth.

primary_choice.reason: Skipped after Railway hosting hit free-tier limits; use Supabase or paid Railway instead.

fallback_attempted.note: CLI add was started; may require browser linking. Re-run stripe projects add Supabase/supabase:free ... locally if not visible in stripe projects status.

deployment.notes: Turso (TURSO_DATABASE_URL, TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN) set in Vercel Production env. Local dev uses data/feedback.sqlite unless USE_TURSO=1. Unset Stripe VERCEL_PROJECT_ID when running vercel CLI if org id error.

successful_adds: stripe projects add Clerk/auth --name clerk-feedback -y --accept-tos --json --config '{"app_name":"Stripe Projects Feedback"}'
next_steps: stripe projects link Vercel && stripe projects add Vercel/project --name vercel-feedback -y --accept-tos --config '{"name":"stripe-projects-feedback"}'
